revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-265

Alternative term: Wharf

A construction along a coast or a bank intended to strengthen it, which also permits berthing for ships and which is generally provided with cargo-handling facilities.

{{IALAFooter}}
